com.bill.java.api.models

Class Session

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.bill.java.api.net.ApiResource
      • com.bill.java.api.models.Session

  • public class Session
extends com.bill.java.api.net.ApiResource
    The Session class represents a user's session credentials and includes all methods for Authentication
    Since:
    0.0.1

    • Method Detail

      • login

        public static Session login(java.lang.String orgId)
                     throws com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException,
                            java.io.IOException
        Logs in and creates a session for further API usage
        Parameters:
        orgId - id of the organization to be associated with the session, user must be associated with the organization
        Returns:
        a Session object containing the response values from the API
        Throws:
        com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException - when the response from the API is unsuccessful
        java.io.IOException - when an I/O exception occurs on the underlying request

      • ListOrgs

        public static java.util.List<OrgInfo> ListOrgs()
                                        throws com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException,
                                               java.io.IOException
        Fetches the list of orgs associated with the user's credentials
        Returns:
        list of OrgInfo objects
        Throws:
        com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException - when the response from the API is unsuccessful
        java.io.IOException - when an I/O exception occurs on the underlying request
        See Also:
        OrgInfo

      • logout

        public static java.lang.Boolean logout()
                                throws com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException,
                                       java.io.IOException
        Logs the user out of the current session
        Returns:
        true if user successfully logged out
        Throws:
        com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException - when the response from the API is unsuccessful
        java.io.IOException - when an I/O exception occurs on the underlying request

      • getSessionInfo

        public static SessionInfo getSessionInfo()
                                  throws com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException,
                                         java.io.IOException
        Returns the current ids of the user and organization associated with the session
        Returns:
        instance of SessionInfo with values set from the Http response
        Throws:
        com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException - when the response from the API is unsuccessful
        java.io.IOException - when an I/O exception occurs on the underlying request

      • requestMFAChallenge

        public static MFAChallenge requestMFAChallenge(java.lang.Boolean useBackup)
                                        throws com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException,
                                               java.io.IOException
        Initiates the MFA flow and returns the challengeId to be used on subsequent call to MFAAuthenticate(String, String, String, String, Boolean)
        Parameters:
        useBackup - if set to true, authentication text will be sent to the user's backup phone
        Returns:
        instance of MFAChallenge with values set from the Http response
        Throws:
        com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException - when the response from the API is unsuccessful
        java.io.IOException - when an I/O exception occurs on the underlying request
        See Also:
        MFA Workflow

      • MFAAuthenticate

        public static MFA MFAAuthenticate(java.lang.String challengeId,
                                  java.lang.String token,
                                  java.lang.String deviceId,
                                  java.lang.String machineName,
                                  java.lang.Boolean rememberMe)
                           throws com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException,
                                  java.io.IOException
        Multi-factor authenticates the session, allowing for calls to MFA protected endpoints
        Parameters:
        challengeId - obtained from requestMFAChallenge(Boolean)
        token - token sent to users phone after call to requestMFAChallenge(Boolean)
        deviceId - string representation of the users device. Arbitrary value, but must be consistent in all call associated with the returned mfaId
        machineName - string representation of the users device. Arbitrary value
        rememberMe - if set to true, sessions will be MFA-authenticated for the next 30 days
        Returns:
        instance of MFA with values set from the Http response
        Throws:
        com.bill.java.api.exception.BDCException - when the response from the API is unsuccessful
        java.io.IOException - when an I/O exception occurs on the underlying request
        See Also:
        MFA Workflow

        public java.lang.String getSessionId()
